name: ton-ai-logger
description: Logger agent for storing and searching logs with LanceDB

scripts.clean: npm run clean:core && npm run clean:lancedb && npm run clean:agent
scripts.clean:agent: cd agents/logger && (test -d dist && rm -rf dist || true) && (test -d node_modules/@ton-ai && rm -rf node_modules/@ton-ai || true)
scripts.build:core: cd packages/core && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.build:lancedb: cd plugins/lancedb && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.copy-packages: mkdir -p agents/logger/node_modules/@ton-ai && cp packages/core/ton-ai-core-0.1.0.tgz agents/logger/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Core package copy skipped' && cp plugins/lancedb/ton-ai-lancedb-0.1.0.tgz agents/logger/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'LanceDB package copy skipped'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:lancedb && npm run build:agent && npm run copy-packages
scripts.rebuild:quick: npm run build:core && npm run build:lancedb && npm run copy-packages && cd agents/logger && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run rebuild && npm run start:agent

author: testertesterov
